    11→
    12→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    13→@Composable
    14→fun AISettingsSheet(
    15→    onDismiss: () -> Unit,
    16→    viewModel: AISettingsViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    17→) {
    18→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    19→
    20→    ModalBottomSheet(onDismissRequest = onDismiss) {
    21→        Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp).fillMaxWidth()) {
    22→            Text("⚙ AI 设置", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge)
    23→            Text("AI 用于词汇释义、句子分析等功能", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
    24→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
    25→
    26→            Spacer(Modifier.height(12.dp))
    27→
    28→            // Provider selector
    29→            var providerExpanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    30→            ExposedDropdownMenuBox(expanded = providerExpanded, onExpandedChange = { providerExpanded = it }) {
    31→                OutlinedTextField(
    32→                    value = AI_PROVIDERS.find { it.id == uiState.provider }?.name ?: "",
    33→                    onValueChange = {},
    34→                    readOnly = true,
    35→                    label = { Text("AI 服务商") },
    36→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().menuAnchor(),
    37→                    trailingIcon = { ExposedDropdownMenuDefaults.TrailingIcon(providerExpanded) }
    38→                )
    39→                ExposedDropdownMenu(expanded = providerExpanded, onDismissRequest = { providerExpanded = false }) {
    40→                    AI_PROVIDERS.forEach { provider ->
    41→                        DropdownMenuItem(
    42→                            text = { Text(provider.name) },
    43→                            onClick = { viewModel.setProvider(provider.id); providerExpanded = false }
    44→                        )
    45→                    }
    46→                }
    47→            }

input.content:
package com.multilanglearner.ui.ai

import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
import com.multilanglearner.data.network.AIService
import com.multilanglearner.data.store.AIConfigStore
import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.*
import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
import javax.inject.Inject

data class AISettingsUiState(
    val provider: String = "deepseek",
    val apiKey: String = "",
    val baseUrl: String = "",
    val model: String = "",
    val maxTokens: String = "",
    val temperature: String = "",
    val groqWhisperEnabled: Boolean = true,
    val whisperModel: String = "whisper-large-v3",
    val subtitleTranslateMode: String = "none",
    val testResult: String = "",
    val testSuccess: Boolean = false
)

@HiltViewModel
class AISettingsViewModel @Inject constructor(
    private val configStore: AIConfigStore,
    private val aiService: AIService
) : ViewModel() {
    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow(AISettingsUiState())
    val uiState: StateFlow<AISettingsUiState> = _uiState.asStateFlow()

    init {
        viewModelScope.launch {
            configStore.config.first().let { cfg ->
                _uiState.update {
                    it.copy(
                        provider = cfg.provider, apiKey = cfg.apiKey,
                        baseUrl = cfg.baseUrl, model = cfg.model,
                        maxTokens = cfg.maxTokens?.toString() ?: "",
                        temperature = cfg.temperature?.toString() ?: "",
